title: perezia multiflora subsp. multiflora
intro: Perezia multiflora subsp. multiflora, also known as the many-flowered perezia, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the Andes mountains in South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of wounds, infections, and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in flavonoids and terpenoids, which are believed to contribute to its medicinal properties and health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Perezia multiflora subsp. multiflora include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
